MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RED_TEARSTONE.desc: Allies with less than [blue]{HpThreshold}%[/blue] HP deal [blue]{DamageBoostValue}%[/blue] additional damage.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-RED_TEARSTONE.flav: This rare gem has the uncanny ability to sense imminent death.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-MARTIAL_AMULET.des: Upon pickup, add all allies' [gold]Strikes[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-MARTIAL_AMULET.fla: Power can be a boon or a burden, but it is not up to you to deny it.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-POISONERS_KIT.desc: Allies can [gold]Enchant[/gold] their Attacks with [purple]Venom[/purple] at [gold]Rest Sites[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-POISONERS_KIT.flav: A poisoner's kit includes the vials, chemicals, and other equipment necessary for the creation of poisons.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-COMMAND_SEAT.descr: Allies gain [blue]{StrengthPower}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] each combat until you take damage.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-COMMAND_SEAT.title: Command Seat
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-CORE_SHARDS.descri: At the start of each combat, each ally [gold]Channels[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Multiplayer Card[/gold].
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-CORE_SHARDS.flavor: Once the shard has burrowed its way into flesh, they can be quite difficult to remove.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-CORE_SHARDS.title: Core Shards
